affected_pattern: TotalCharges NULL specifically for GGSN-originated traffic after certificate rotation
root_cause: Diameter interface certificate mis-rotation — the new cert on the charging gateway had an incorrect SAN, causing Diameter-CCR requests to fail TLS handshake and the gateway to drop usage events silently.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Diameter mTLS Rotation Defect pattern
Charging gateway tls-error counter spiked at rotation time
Cert SAN differs from the peer's verify list
recommended_action: Reissue the certificate with correct SANs and redeploy
Replay the dropped CCR events from gateway cache
Gate future cert rotations behind a peer-handshake smoke test
